revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''1-1-115

Spectrum (of a radiation)

Spatial display of a polychromatic radiation produced by separation of its monochromatic components.

Composition of a polychromatic radiation.

Note: Examples of sense 2 Continuous spectrum, line spectrum.


Reference: C.I.E. (modified)

{{IALAFooter}}
